title: Update Or Remove Assets - RiskIQ Digital Footprint
content:
Using various user inputs, this playbook checks if the user wants to update or remove an asset, and performs the respective actions.
 Supported integration:
 - RiskIQ Digital Footprint

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the RiskIQ pack (RiskIQDigitalFootprint, community-supported).

Inputs — asset_name: Name of the asset.; asset_type: Type of the asset. Possible values are: Domain, Host, IP Address, IP Block, ASN, Page, SSL Cert, Contact.; support_email_address: The contact email address of the support team from which manual inputs should be fetched..

Integrations/scripts used: df-update-assets.
raw_yaml:

version: -1
name: Update Or Remove Assets - RiskIQ Digital Footprint
description: |-
 Using various user inputs, this playbook checks if the user wants to update or remove an asset, and performs the respective actions.
  Supported integration:

        - Remove
        - None

        placeholder: ""

      title: Operation to perform on the asset
